productName: Swifts Edibles - Truffle-Milk-Sativa-100mg - Chocolate - THC - Sativa - 120g
description: A premium chocolate treat with old-world dessert energy: silky texture, warm cocoa aroma, and a refined cannabis finish that makes each bite feel indulgent. It features THC for a classic euphoric lift. A flavorful hybrid option for customers who want their cannabis wrapped in something genuinely craveable.
